actions.value:
In order to swap or send USDT, and erc-20 token on Ethereum, you'll first need some ETH in order to pay the gas fees associated with that transaction, on that blockchain.

 

Please be aware: USDT cannot pay its own fees!

 

This is a blockchain policy, and we receive no profit from these gas fees. They go strictly to Ethereum network validators to process your transaction into a block, on-chain. If your USDT token wallet is part of an empty, 0 ETH wallet -- then these tokens will be temporarily stuck until you either buy or transfer some ETH into this wallet.

 

Note: Gas prices can sharply rise when Ethereum becomes congested and trend lower over nights and weekends. You can check current 'Estimated Cost of Transaction Actions' on https://etherscan.io/gastracker
 

Please let us know if you have any more questions about this.
